reviews.review_title: cricket X for all age group
reviews.review_description:
Recently, I tried Cricket X, and I was surprised at how this game can help any player, no matter their level, improve their timing. This game is suitable for all ages, and I believe it is the best cricket game available on the market right now. I love it! 

I think it's great for kids as young as 6 or 7, and I'm 56 years old myself. Although I’m on the heavier side, I spend 30 to 40 minutes playing every day. Overall, I truly believe this is the best cricket game currently available. Thank you!

This game is very good in my opinion, but has one issue. Randomly in middle of the match’s when I’m chasing, the game freezes and I can’t do anything except restart the app. So that is why I am giving 4 stars. If that bug gets fixed, then this game would easily have gotten 5 stars! Also some few minor updates I would like to see in the future is:

1. Again that annoying bug being fixed
2. better fielding
3. changes in fielding
4. The bat being able to tap on the floor instead of going through the it
5. The bat being able to hit the wickets so that hit wickets are possible
6. I wish there is a tv scoreboard on the stands that shows your score and how many runs left to chase
7. Wides should be added. As of right now, when the bowler bowls wides, they are counted as a good ball

Overall the games is really good and with these updates (especially that annoying bug fix) this games would deserve 5 stars!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback. We truly appreciate it and will be incorporating your suggestions into our simulator. We’re rolling out a major update within the next week, and this release will also address the reported bug. We hope you’ll enjoy the new update and notice the improvements.

reviews.review_description: Cricket X is a very well made tool for practicing cricket. It has really helped me work on my weaker areas and improve my shot selection and timing. It is not only physically and dynamically accurate but helps keep your batting senses sharp during off season. Highly Recommended.
Have tried multiple cricket sports game. This is so far the best. Highly recommended for a good time playing cricket from your room

The game is unplayable now that bat mapping is behind a subscription wall.
When using a Quest controller the bat is upside down.
Please rectify ASAP.

EDIT - Shout out to the developers. “Thank you.”
Bat mapping back and fixed.

developer_response.body: Hi Shankur, Thankyou so much for identifying the problem at the right time. Please shoot me a message at hadi@xrevstudio.com. I would love to get your insights to make this product better and if you want we can provide you early access for coming up features as well.

reviews.review_description:
So I’ve been buying all the cricket games to support and encourage more VR cricket gaming. This game is only $20 and it’s decent as a cricket game. 
The subscription model is a bad idea because for $30 IB Cricket has way more features. The subscription is for training with custom lines and lengths. 
The physics is good enough and batting is decent with the ball strike being decently satisfying. I haven’t explored more yet but overall this game is decent. 
I couldn’t rate 3.5 stars so I rounded it to 4.
Will update review as needed. So far so good.
Really awesome game for someone who wants to pearn cricket before actually going into the field
Excited to see where this app is heading. Just getting started on it and finding it really fun so far. Waiting for a bat to take it to the next level

reviews.review_title: Need too much changes in the app.
reviews.review_description:
They are few things which should be considered for this game to get popular.
1. Too much expensive for subscription as compared to other app which are free.

2. There is no commentary for out, four, six, etc.

3. Every time there is different kind of ball. There should be 6 balls from same bowler instead it keep changing.

4. Everytime we need to touch the ball to play. Atleast 1 over should be direct play.

5. There should be arrows in chase mode to select over, runs and wickets instead of bar to drag which doesn't come to place of our wish.

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you so much for your feedback. We completely agree with your suggestions. The program is currently in early access, and we’re making great progress thanks to the valuable input from our users. I’d love to include you in the development of the CricketX program, where your guidance could help us shape its future. Please reach out to CricketX@XRevStudio.com

reviews.review_description: Should have variations in bowling, also should perceive batsman playing style and strategy . At present it feel’s very basic to play.
Must buy. This is the best ever cricket app on this platform. Their physics is mind blowing.

reviews.review_title: Improves batting and good for coaching
reviews.review_description: Very realistic and helpful in batting, specially the training aspect where you can chose line, length, speed, swing and the type of bowler. I managed to improve my batting and the companion app is also really helpful for the coaching side, you get all the insights and analytics you wish for. Cricket X is just amazing.
The subscription is way too much

The simple and intuitive design of this game, makes the game more fun to play.

Theres different modes to play and you can choose which side you bat as well.

The immersive experience is also very impressive as I was totally lost in the game until my battery ran out haha.

Kudos to the devs!
Cant wait for further updates.
The game is amazing in terms of feel. It'll be great to have some more modes in the game because I love to challenge my abilities in different ways.
The game didn't even start and was stuck at loading playing on meta quest3. Also the subscription $$ is little too much.

reviews.review_title: It’s kicks me off the game for no reason
reviews.review_description: Please can you fix how when I play it kicks me iof the game mid game for some reason

developer_response.body: Hi, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. We are working on resolving this issue. Please send us an email at cricketX@xrevstudio.com, and we will notify you as soon as it’s fixed.
